patch.value:
## Context

`src/cli/commands/gc.ts:22-48` defines GC_TARGETS. The embeddings scope covers:
- `search/embeddings.jsonl`
- `search/vectorization-status.json`
- `search/lancedb/`

But NOT `search/pending-refresh.json` (written by `src/core/search/background-refresh.ts:136`).

After gc --scope embeddings, if a background worker is still running or a queued file exists, the worker drains the queue, calls refreshSemanticEmbeddingsForMutatedItems, reads the (now empty) ledger as '{}', and upserts only the queued items into a fresh vector store — leaving the remaining 1056 items unindexed with no warning.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Add `search/pending-refresh.json` to the embeddings GC_TARGETS
- [ ] OR: when gc --scope embeddings runs, acquire the reindex lock briefly to flush and discard the pending queue
- [ ] Document that gc --scope embeddings invalidates the entire semantic index (requires pm reindex --mode semantic to rebuild)
- [ ] Add a test that verifies the pending queue is cleared after gc

## Evidence

- `src/cli/commands/gc.ts:29-47` — embeddings targets list; pending-refresh.json absent
- `src/core/search/background-refresh.ts:61-66` — pending queue path = `search/pending-refresh.json`
- `.agents/pm/search/pending-refresh.json` present in this repo (currently contains 11 bytes)
LanceDB snapshot: add gc --scope embeddings to include pending-refresh.json and drift-cache coordination

pm gc --scope embeddings removes search/embeddings.jsonl, search/vectorization-status.json, and search/lancedb/ but does NOT remove search/pending-refresh.json. If there are queued items in the pending-refresh queue when gc runs, the next spawned background worker will attempt to re-embed items that no longer have a vector store, potentially re-creating a partial ledger inconsistency.

- Add `search/pending-refresh.json` to the embeddings GC_TARGETS
- OR: when gc --scope embeddings runs, acquire the reindex lock briefly to flush and discard the pending queue
- Document that gc --scope embeddings invalidates the entire semantic index (requires pm reindex --mode semantic to rebuild)
- Add a test that verifies the pending queue is cleared after gc
